title: [Ancient Aether + Treasure Reforging] Valkyrum Compatibility
description: Adds compatibility between Ancient Aether and Treasure Reforging making possible to obtain a TR Valkyrum Ingot by enchanting a AA Valkyrum.
body:
**Adds compatibility between Ancient Aether and Treasure Reforging making possible to obtain a TR Valkyrum Ingot by enchanting a AA Valkyrum.** ---
